text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the final moments before the race, Taiki
Shuttle can only think about running her heart
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to beat Silence Suzuka, and—above
all—to become the next Umamusume of the
Year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle heads for the racecourse full of
energy, with power in her every step!
